chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.predicate: has unit price at time of order
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Line 1
triplets.object: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each

triplets.subject: Refund
triplets.object: a customer when an order is cancelled

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CUST_ID column in the CUSTOMER_MASTER table representing the customer identifier used to link to and identify customer master records, and referenced by dependent tables.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order line item is a record representing a single product line within a sales order, linking the order to the product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Items
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual line item within a sales order that references exactly one product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Product | Key Attributes: - Quantity of units ordered | Key Attributes: - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric column that stores the ID of the parent category for a given category, functioning as a self-referential foreign key to establish the category hierarchy in TB_CATEGORY.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment represents a monetary transaction used to settle a Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment ID and tracked with attributes such as payment method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status (e.g., PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: Header record for each customer sales order, identified by ORDER_ID, with CUST_ID as a foreign key to CUSTOMER_MASTER.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is a single consignment of goods referenced by a unique Shipment ID, linked to exactly one Sales Order, with a source warehouse, a destination customer address, a shipped timestamp, a tracking number, and a status such as PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, or DELIVERED.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A reference to the product's primary key (PRODUCT_ID) in the TB_PRODUCT table, typically used as a foreign key to link to a product record.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Bigint
entities_post_resolution.definition: A 64-bit signed integer data type used to store large numeric identifiers (e.g., order IDs) in database schemas.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Decimal(10,2)
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product display name stored as a VARCHAR with a maximum length of 300 characters.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | TOTAL_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Total order value | NO | | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | | | FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.definition:

- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records, including identifiers, contact details, regional association, account status, and the date the record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products including identifiers, names, pricing, category association, and whether the product is active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the category hierarchy and names for product categories, including a reference to a parent category for nested categories.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for customer orders, including identifiers, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the items listed on each order, including product, quantity, pricing, and the computed line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments associated with customer orders, including the method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with customer orders, including where and when each package was shipped, its tracking identifier, and current shipment status.
